headline: Patronus AI Raises $50 Million Series B and Unveils First Digital World Models for AI Agent Training and Simulation
summary: Patronus AI today announced a $50 million Series B led by Greenfield Partners and unveiled its Digital World Models, a new class of large-scale simulation environments designed to help AI systems train, evaluate, and improve across complex digital workflows. The round included participation from existing investors Notable Capital, Lightspeed Venture Partners, Datadog, Samsung, Factorial Capital, Gokul Rajaram, and leading AI and software executives.

headline: Micron To Rally More Than 57%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Thursday
summary: Top analysts changed outlook on top names. See full changes, upgrades, downgrades on analyst ratings page. See how analysts view PepsiCo, Absci, Okta, Datadog, ICON, Nike, UWM, Micron.
